content: Patch 1: Wire ListingDetail.jsx chips (category, mode, condition, size) through existing taxonomy keys
Patch 2: Home.jsx — add trends.bucket.* keys to all 12 locales + wire chip + restructure FALLBACK_TRENDS
Patch 3: Refactor SeoBase.jsx META → i18n keys + add seo.* keys to all 12 locales
Patch 4: Refactor countries.js to use Intl.DisplayNames (add localisedCountryName helper)
Lint + esbuild + screenshot verification of all patches
Plan mobile (Capacitor) port for Chrome extension shopping assistant — gather requirements
